project: Autonomous 10/10 Production Leader — evidence sweep, infra orchestrator, proof machine

tasks.title: Bootstrap ship-10-10 + ship-infra orchestrators
tasks.acceptance: npm run ship:10-10 -- --skip-infra --skip-live runs verify:all; manifest v25 tasks listed; loop skill points at v25.

tasks.title: Evidence UI on all measured panels
tasks.acceptance: CapabilityEvidenceBar on deep-crawl, cwv, ppc, attribution, coverage, traffic; measurement-evidence test lists capabilities.

tasks.title: MIN_PANEL_SAMPLE at scan/score time
tasks.acceptance: Insufficient panel sample excludes AI from measured_inputs; unit test passes.

tasks.title: Per-keyword rank schedule sync
tasks.acceptance: rank_schedule_keywords synced on ensure; schedule runs scoped keywords; test passes.

tasks.title: AI capture Supabase Storage upload
tasks.acceptance: evidence-writer uploads when SUPABASE_* set; visibility-scanner stores evidence_url; tests pass.

tasks.title: Marketing gate on landing + agencies
tasks.acceptance: Public pages use canRenderClaim; unbacked claims hidden when ZERO_PAID_KEYS.

tasks.title: WordPress traffic pixel plugin
tasks.acceptance: Plugin injects pixel.js; embed doc exists.

tasks.title: production-gate.yml CI workflow
tasks.acceptance: Workflow runs verify:all + railway:verify + production:ready on dispatch.

tasks.title: Live infra ship-infra run
tasks.acceptance: ship-infra completes or documents Railway browser auth pause.

tasks.title: Full ship-10-10 gate green
tasks.acceptance: npm run ship:10-10 green; CI on main green.
